## Quick install

- Chrome: download `chatgpt-turborender-<version>-chrome.zip`, unzip it, open `chrome://extensions`, enable Developer mode, click `Load unpacked`, and select the extracted folder.
- Edge: download `chatgpt-turborender-<version>-edge.zip`, unzip it, open `edge://extensions`, enable Developer mode, click `Load unpacked`, and select the extracted folder.
- Firefox: download `chatgpt-turborender-<version>-firefox.xpi`, open `about:addons`, click the gear icon, choose `Install Add-on From File...`, and select the signed `.xpi`.

## What these files are

- Chrome and Edge releases are unpacked browser builds packaged as `.zip` files for manual loading.
- Firefox releases are signed `.xpi` files that can be installed directly in Firefox.
- If you prefer local builds, use the unpacked output directories from the repository instead of the release files.

## Need more detail?

See the [repository install guide](./docs/browser-packages.md) for the full packaging and manual install flow.
